title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 544.520 - Name of prosecutor returned with bail bond
text:
544.520.  Name of prosecutor returned with bail bond. — If in such case the accused shall be held to answer for the offense, it shall be the duty of the associate circuit judge to make out a certificate of the name, occupation and place of abode of the prosecutor, and return the same, with the recognizance of such prisoner, to the proper county.
(RSMo 1939 § 3888) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3498; 1919 § 3843; 1909 § 5051
